user.title: Add a TV
user.description: Enter a name and the address shown in the TV Assist app under Settings → Notifications. Each TV becomes a device you can pick from the dropdown when calling tv_assist.notify.

data.name: Name (e.g. Bedroom TV)
data.token: Access token (only if set on the TV under Notifications)

error.invalid_identifier: Use only lowercase letters, numbers and underscores.

init.title: TV Assist options
init.description: Set the access token to match the one shown on the TV under Settings → Notifications. Leave blank if the TV has no token.
